allow: PowerShell(wsl -d ubuntu-24.04 -- bash -lc 'cd /home/cascata/symfony-react && ls -la && rm -rf api && git clone --depth=1 https://github.com/dunglas/symfony-docker.git api 2>&1 | tail -20')

Bash(wsl.exe -d ubuntu-24.04 -- bash -lc 'curl -sS -o /dev/null -w "api.localhost -> HTTP %{http_code}\\n" -H "Host: api.localhost" http://localhost/ ; curl -sS -o /dev/null -w "app.localhost -> HTTP %{http_code}\\n" -H "Host: app.localhost" http://localhost/')

Bash(wsl.exe -d ubuntu-24.04 -- bash -lc 'ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep ":80 " ; echo "---probe---" ; curl -sS -o /dev/null -w "api.localhost -> HTTP %{http_code}\\n" -H "Host: api.localhost" http://localhost/ ; curl -sS -o /dev/null -w "app.localhost -> HTTP %{http_code}\\n" -H "Host: app.localhost" http://localhost/')
